tools.Name: Hermes Agent
tools.Description: A self-improving, multi-platform AI agent capable of autonomous skill creation, long-term memory, and cross-session learning.
tools.Use_Case: Developing flexible AI assistants that persist across different messaging platforms and environments (VPS, serverless, local).

tools.Name: Crawlee for Python
tools.Description: A robust web scraping and browser automation library designed to build reliable, high-performance crawlers for AI and RAG applications.
tools.Use_Case: Automated data extraction from websites for RAG pipelines, LLM training, or AI data ingestion.

tools.Name: Sirchmunk
tools.Description: An indexless, real-time search engine that works directly on raw data to generate self-evolving knowledge clusters.
tools.Use_Case: Enabling intelligent, real-time knowledge retrieval across vast local document repositories without the overhead of traditional vector databases.
